title: Wire: Send WebSocket close frame on client exit
description:
When the CLI exits (Ctrl-C or /quit), the TCP connection drops with no WebSocket close handshake. The relay logs an error: 'ws error from <pub_id>: <io error>' instead of a clean disconnect.

Required:
- In transport.rs, send Message::Close before dropping the connection
- Handle SIGINT in CLI main to trigger clean shutdown
- Relay should log 'disconnected: <pub_id>' not an error on clean close
- Test: relay log should show clean disconnect, not error
